channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alibaba shares rise on AI investment optimism
item.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (BABA) saw its stock price surge following reports of increased investment in artificial intelligence research and development. Investors are increasingly looking for opport...

item.title: Ontario Police Officer Charged with Assault and Uttering Threats Off-Duty
item.description: An officer with the Kawartha Lakes Police Service has been charged with assault and uttering threats following an alleged off-duty incident on July 1. The Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) laid charges ...

item.title: Super Typhoon Inday Brings Heavy Rainfall and Strong Winds to Mindanao
item.description: Super Typhoon Inday has intensified the southwest monsoon (Habagat), causing significant impacts across Mindanao. In Shariff Aguak, Maguindanao del Sur, strong winds and heavy rains caused a tarp in a...

item.title: Manipur initiates new security operations to target perpetrators of Assam Rifle personnel killings
item.description: Manipur government has announced new security operations to identify and arrest those responsible for the ambush that killed two Assam Rifle personnel. Home Minister Govindas Konthoujam stated that th...

item.title: NACADA Closes Unlicensed Rehab Centre After Rescuing Foreign Nationals
item.description: Authorities in Kenya have rescued eight foreign nationals from an unlicensed rehabilitation centre in Kajiado County following a dawn raid led by the National Authority for the Campaign Against Alcoho...

item.title: Tanzania partners with AfricaNenda, Gates Foundation, and Equity Group to boost digital financial infrastructure
item.description: Tanzania is set to benefit from a major continental partnership aimed at strengthening digital financial infrastructure across Africa. The collaboration between AfricaNenda Foundation, Equity Group Ho...

item.title: Zooey Deschanel's Blonde Transformation for Elf Role
item.description: Zooey Deschanel revealed that her decision to dye her hair blonde for the 2003 film 'Elf' stemmed from an audition for a pop star role akin to Britney Spears. During a 2026 interview on The Zach Sang ...

item.title: Army Chief Commits to Combating Cross-Border Terrorism and Dismantling Sanctuaries
item.description: Field Marshal Asim Munir, Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of the Army Staff (COAS), has reaffirmed Pakistan's resolve to eradicate terrorism originating from across borders through decisive mi...

item.title: NRL State of Origin controversy: Bostock denies knocking on before Best's decisive try
item.description: In a contentious State of Origin match at Suncorp Stadium, NSW fullback Jack Bostock vehemently denied allegations that he knocked the ball on before Bradman Best's match-winning try. The incident occ...

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Partners with Voter Registration Group to Mobilize Fans
item.description: Pop star Olivia Rodrigo has taken a public stand against the Trump administration's use of her music, mobilizing her fanbase to vote. Following her outrage over the Department of Homeland Security's p...

item.title: Trump warns Iran of further strikes as ceasefire ends in Middle East tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump has warned Iran that the United States is preparing for additional strikes following the collapse of a ceasefire agreement. The warning came after Iranian attacks on American mi...

item.title: Carbon Monoxide Risks from Indoor Imbawula Use: Safety Precautions Needed
item.description: As temperatures drop in South Africa, the use of imbawulas (coal braziers) for heating and cooking has increased. However, emergency services are cautioning against indoor use due to carbon monoxide p...

item.title: Kenyan PhD Candidate Successfully Defends Dissertation on Food Insecurity
item.description: Michael Atuahene Djan, a Kenyan PhD candidate, recently successfully defended his dissertation on food insecurity among college students in Nebraska. The academic journey, which he once described as f...

item.title: Suspended Legal Head Arrested in Disciplinary Case Involving Alleged Corruption
item.description: Adv. Kemi Behari, the suspended head of legal services in Ekurhuleni, has been arrested by the Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) following a disciplinary hearing. This development marks progress in ...

item.title: Abuja Police Arrest Kidnapping Gang, Recover ₦8.8m Ransom
item.description: FCT Police have successfully arrested a notorious 'one chance' kidnapping gang in Abuja after recovering ₦8.8 million ransom, two vehicles, and other stolen items. The gang targeted a female victim, d...

item.title: Toronto's World Cup saw increased use of walking, cycling, and transit
item.description: Data from the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Toronto reveals a significant shift in urban mobility patterns. During the tournament, pedestrian activity around the Toronto Stadium surged by 130% on the first m...

item.title: Amit Shah to Lead Border Security Conference on Migration and Demographics
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming conference chaired by Gujarat Chief Minister Amit Shah, focusing on border security challenges. The event will bring together senior police officers (SPs) to address...

item.title: Tony Elumelu Retires as UBA Group Chairman After 12 Years, Emmanuel Nnorom to Take Over
item.description: Tony Elumelu, the billionaire businessman and philanthropist, is stepping down as Chairman of United Bank for Africa (UBA) after a 12-year tenure. His retirement date is set for August 21, 2026, follo...

item.title: Environmental Concerns Rise as Illegal Mining Increases Silt in Lake Rukwa
item.description: Unregulated mining activities in Tanzania's Rukwa region are causing severe sedimentation in Lake Rukwa, threatening its ecosystem and local communities. The extraction of minerals has led to soil ero...

item.title: Rescue operations ongoing after typhoon hits China amid flood warnings
item.description: Rescue teams are actively searching for survivors in regions affected by recent storms in China as a powerful super typhoon approaches. The situation has raised concerns about potential flooding and d...
